issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were triggering enrollment in multiple workflow branches simultaneously, causing HAs and TCs to receive duplicate tasks. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve the filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks to avoid double-processing.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued to receive post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow was not properly filtering out these terminal deal stages as unenrollment criteria. Madelaine made a tweak to the workflow filters on March 9th to address this.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any lingering check-in tasks for deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO reassignment
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated workflow emails continued to reference and display the previous LO's information rather than the updated one. This affected agent-facing emails and was identified as a product-side issue. Luis resolved the issue on March 13th.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually send a corrected email to the agent with the updated loan officer information.

issues.title: TC workflow not triggering on re-enrollment when deal stage flipped back to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage (e.g., Committed or Referred Active), and then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow and closing tasks did not re-trigger on the second transition. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was missing from the workflow's re-enrollment criteria. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria on March 16th.
issues.workaround: For any deals that were flipped back and forth through Offer Accepted and missed TC task enrollment, manually enroll the deal in the TC workflow to generate the required closing tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals that were updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering TC workflow enrollment or generating TC tasks. This primarily affected deals with no lender assigned, which is standard for MRC leads. Madelaine spoke with HubSpot support and confirmed the issue was fixed on April 1st.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between the impact start and April 1st into the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are generated and TCs are notified.
